description: This pipeline processes image data to analyze and filter specific regions of interest, focusing on identifying and categorizing various types of cells and their interactions, such as cell adherence and engulfment, through a series of overlapping and exclusionary steps to provide detailed insights into cellular behavior and associations.

69959079-18ff-4047-ae1e-189ad8fc5510.name: ij1-roi-filter-by-overlap
69959079-18ff-4047-ae1e-189ad8fc5510.description:
Filters the ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
